name: base-state-machine-runtime
description: A runtime guide for creating deterministic, artifact-gated state-machine skills.

handoff_artifacts.description: Architecture or design handoff artifacts must preserve why decisions were made, not only what to build.

SELECT_TEMPLATE.goal: Choose the canonical state-machine templates and identify the target skill directory.
instructions: Use templates/flow.json and templates/SKILL.md as the starter pair.
Confirm the target skill name, description, states, artifacts, and validation needs before adapting templates.
entry_criteria: A request exists to create or standardize a phased state-machine skill.
exit_criteria: Target skill directory and placeholder substitutions are identified.

ready.condition: Template files and target skill requirements are known.

ADAPT_FLOW.goal: Adapt the flow template into a deterministic state graph for the target skill.
instructions: Replace placeholders with concrete state names, transition triggers, and artifact gates.
Represent correction loops explicitly and keep completion behind a critic gate.
exit_criteria: Target flow.json is valid JSON and every non-terminal state has an explicit transition.

flow_ready.condition: The target flow defines metadata, states, artifacts, validations, and transitions.

flow_invalid.condition: JSON parsing or transition review fails.

ADAPT_SKILL.goal: Adapt the SKILL.md template into agent-facing instructions that match the flow.
instructions: Keep SKILL.md focused on behavior and cognitive rules, not transition mechanics already encoded in flow.json.
Mirror every state from flow.json with matching persona, goal, responsibilities, and artifact expectations.
exit_criteria: Target SKILL.md has valid frontmatter, runtime rules, state instructions, validation guidance, and handoff requirements.

instructions_ready.condition: SKILL.md mirrors the target flow and has no unresolved placeholders.

CRITIC.goal: Verify the target skill follows the state-machine runtime contract.
instructions: Check JSON validity, frontmatter completeness, state coverage, artifact gates, and validation paths.
Send the work back to the relevant adaptation state if any required contract is missing.
entry_criteria: Target flow.json and SKILL.md both exist.
exit_criteria: The target skill is complete, deterministic, artifact-gated, and validated.

flow_rework.condition: Flow graph, gates, or validation rules are incomplete.

skill_rework.condition: Agent instructions do not match the flow or contain unresolved placeholders.

COMPLETE.goal: State-machine skill templates or generated skill are ready for use.
instructions: Summarize the generated files and validation evidence.
exit_criteria: No unresolved runtime contract gaps remain.
